name: Kielbasa Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can (11 1/2 oz.) bean with bacon soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, bring water and vegetables to a boil.
2. Simmer for 10 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
3. Add kielbasa and soup.
4. Heat through.
5. Garnish with parsley if desired.
6. Serve for 6 servings.
